```html
      if(!movies||!movies.length) { document.getElementById('moviesTable').style.display='none'; document.getElementById('moviesEmpty').style.display='block'; return; }
      document.getElementById('moviesTable').style.display='table'; document.getElementById('moviesEmpty').style.display='none'; tbody.innerHTML='';
      movies.forEach(m=>{
        tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td>'+m.id+'</td><td><div class="movie-info">'+(m.cover_url?'<img class="movie-cover" src="'+m.cover_url+'" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">':'<div class="movie-cover" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;">🎬</div>')+'<div><div class="movie-title">'+escapeHtml(m.title)+'</div></div></div></td><td>'+(m.tags?m.tags.split(', ').map(t=>'<span class="tag">'+t+'</span>').join(''):'-')+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(m.directors||'-')+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(m.actors||'-')+'</td><td>'+(m.release_year||'-')+'</td><td>'+(m.duration?m.duration+'分钟':'-')+'</td><td><div class="table-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-edit" onclick="editMovie('+m.id+')">编辑</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-delete" onclick="confirmDelete(\'movie\','+m.id+',\''+escapeHtml(m.title)+'\')">删除</button></div></td></tr>';
      });
    }
    function renderMoviePagination() {
      const p=document.getElementById('moviesPagination'); const tp=Math.ceil(movieTotal/moviePageSize);
      if(tp<=1) { p.style.display='none'; return; }
      p.style.display='flex'; p.innerHTML='<button '+(moviePage<=1?'disabled':'')+' onclick="moviePage--;loadMovies()">上一页</button><span>第 '+moviePage+' / '+tp+' 页 (共 '+movieTotal+' 条)</span><button '+(moviePage>=tp?'disabled':'')+' onclick="moviePage++;loadMovies()">下一页</button>';
    }
    function searchMovies() { movieSearchKeyword=document.getElementById('movieSearch').value.trim(); moviePage=1; loadMovies(); }
    document.getElementById('movieSearch').addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')searchMovies();});
    async function openMovieModal(md) {
      document.getElementById('movieModalTitle').textContent=md?'编辑电影':'添加电影'; document.getElementById('movieId').value=md?md.id:'';
      document.getElementById('movieTitle').value=md?md.title:''; document.getElementById('movieDescription').value=md?(md.description||''):'';
      document.getElementById('movieCoverUrl').value=md?(md.cover_url||''):''; document.getElementById('movieVideoUrl').value=md?(md.video_url||''):'';
      document.getElementById('movieReleaseYear').value=md?(md.release_year||''):''; document.getElementById('movieDuration').value=md?(md.duration||''):'';
      await loadRelationSelectors(md); document.getElementById('movieModal').classList.add('active');
    }
    async function loadRelationSelectors(md) {
      try {
        const [tr,dr,ar]=await Promise.all([fetch(ADMIN_API+'/tags').then(r=>r.json()),fetch(ADMIN_API+'/directors').then(r=>r.json()),fetch(ADMIN_API+'/actors').then(r=>r.json())]);
        allTags=tr.success?(tr.data.tags||tr.data):[]; allDirectors=dr.success?(dr.data.directors||dr.data):[]; allActors=ar.success?(ar.data.actors||ar.data):[];
        const mt=md&&md.tags?md.tags.map(t=>t.id):[]; const mdir=md&&md.directors?md.directors.map(d=>d.id):[]; const ma=md&&md.actors?md.actors:[];
        document.getElementById('movieTagSelector').innerHTML=allTags.length?allTags.map(t=>'<div class="relation-item"><input type="checkbox" id="mt_'+t.id+'" value="'+t.id+'" '+(mt.includes(t.id)?'checked':'')+'><label for="mt_'+t.id+'">'+escapeHtml(t.name)+'</label></div>').join(''):'暂无标签';
        document.getElementById('movieDirectorSelector').innerHTML=allDirectors.length?allDirectors.map(d=>'<div class="relation-item"><input type="checkbox" id="md_'+d.id+'" value="'+d.id+'" '+(mdir.includes(d.id)?'checked':'')+'><label for="md_'+d.id+'">'+escapeHtml(d.name)+'</label></div>').join(''):'暂无导演';
        document.getElementById('movieActorSelector').innerHTML=allActors.length?allActors.map(a=>{const maa=ma.find(x=>x.id===a.id);return '<div class="relation-item"><input type="checkbox" id="ma_'+a.id+'" value="'+a.id+'" '+(maa?'checked':'')+'><label for="ma_'+a.id+'">'+escapeHtml(a.name)+'</label><input type="text" class="role-input" id="ma_role_'+a.id+'" placeholder="饰演角色" value="'+(maa?escapeHtml(maa.role||''):'')+'"></div>';}).join(''):'暂无演员';
      } catch(e){console.error(e);}
    }
    async function editMovie(id) { try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/movies/'+id);const d=await r.json();if(d.success)openMovieModal(d.data);else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');} }
    async function saveMovie() {
      const id=document.getElementById('movieId').value; const title=document.getElementById('movieTitle').value.trim();
      if(!title){showToast('电影标题不能为空','error');return;}
      const body={title,description:document.getElementById('movieDescription').value.trim(),cover_url:document.getElementById('movieCoverUrl').value.trim(),video_url:document.getElementById('movieVideoUrl').value.trim(),release_year:document.getElementById('movieReleaseYear').value||null,duration:document.getElementById('movieDuration').value||null,tags:[],directors:[],actors:[]};
      document.querySelectorAll('#movieTagSelector input:checked').forEach(cb=>body.tags.push(parseInt(cb.value)));
      document.querySelectorAll('#movieDirectorSelector input:checked').forEach(cb=>body.directors.push(parseInt(cb.value)));
      document.querySelectorAll('#movieActorSelector input:checked').forEach(cb=>{const ai=parseInt(cb.value);body.actors.push({id:ai,role:(document.getElementById('ma_role_'+ai)||{}).value||''});});
      try{const r=await fetch(id?ADMIN_API+'/movies/'+id:ADMIN_API+'/movies',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('movieModal');loadMovies();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}
    }
    function openImportModal(){importData=null;document.getElementById('importPreview').style.display='none';document.getElementById('importResult').style.display='none';document.getElementById('importBtn').disabled=true;document.getElementById('importFile').value='';document.getElementById('importModal').classList.add('active');}
    function handleImportFile(e){const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=function(ev){try{const d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);if(!Array.isArray(d)){showToast('格式错误','error');return;}importData=d;document.getElementById('importPreview').style.display='block';document.getElementById('importFileCount').textContent='已解析 '+d.length+' 条';document.getElementById('importBtn').disabled=false;document.getElementById('importResult').style.display='none';}catch(e){showToast('JSON解析失败','error');}};r.readAsText(f);}
    async function doImport(){if(!importData||!importData.length){showToast('无数据','error');return;}document.getElementById('importBtn').disabled=true;document.getElementById('importBtn').textContent='导入中...';try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/movies/batch-import',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({movies:importData})});const d=await r.json();document.getElementById('importResult').style.display='block';document.getElementById('importResultMsg').textContent=d.message;if(d.data&&d.data.errors)document.getElementById('importErrors').innerHTML=d.data.errors.map(e=>'<li>'+escapeHtml(e)+'</li>').join('');if(d.success){showToast('导入完成','success');loadMovies();}}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}finally{document.getElementById('importBtn').disabled=false;document.getElementById('importBtn').textContent='开始导入';}}
    async function loadTags(){document.getElementById('tagsLoading').style.display='block';document.getElementById('tagsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('tagsEmpty').style.display='none';try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/tags');const d=await r.json();if(d.success){allTags=d.data.tags||d.data;renderTags(allTags);}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}finally{document.getElementById('tagsLoading').style.display='none';}}
    function renderTags(tags){const sv=(document.getElementById('tagSearch').value||'').trim().toLowerCase();const f=sv?tags.filter(t=>t.name.toLowerCase().includes(sv)):tags;const tbody=document.getElementById('tagsTableBody');if(!f.length){document.getElementById('tagsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('tagsEmpty').style.display='block';return;}document.getElementById('tagsTable').style.display='table';document.getElementById('tagsEmpty').style.display='none';tbody.innerHTML='';f.forEach(t=>{tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td>'+t.id+'</td><td><span class="tag">'+escapeHtml(t.name)+'</span></td><td>'+(t.created_at?new Date(t.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'):'-')+'</td><td><div class="table-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-edit" onclick="editTag('+t.id+',\''+escapeHtml(t.name)+'\')">编辑</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-delete" onclick="confirmDelete(\'tag\','+t.id+',\''+escapeHtml(t.name)+'\')">删除</button></div></td></tr>';});}
    document.getElementById('tagSearch').addEventListener('input',()=>renderTags(allTags));
    function openTagModal(td){document.getElementById('tagModalTitle').textContent=td?'编辑标签':'添加标签';document.getElementById('tagId').value=td?td.id:'';document.getElementById('tagName').value=td?td.name:'';document.getElementById('tagModal').classList.add('active');}
    function editTag(id,name){openTagModal({id,name});}
    async function saveTag(){const id=document.getElementById('tagId').value;const name=document.getElementById('tagName').value.trim();if(!name){showToast('标签名称不能为空','error');return;}try{const r=await fetch(id?ADMIN_API+'/tags/'+id:ADMIN_API+'/tags',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({name})});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('tagModal');loadTags();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    async function loadGenres(){document.getElementById('genresLoading').style.display='block';document.getElementById('genresTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('genresEmpty').style.display='none';try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/genres');const d=await r.json();if(d.success)renderGenres(d.data.genres||[]);else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}finally{document.getElementById('genresLoading').style.display='none';}}
    function renderGenres(genres){const sv=(document.getElementById('genreSearch').value||'').trim().toLowerCase();const f=sv?genres.filter(g=>g.name.toLowerCase().includes(sv)||g.code.toLowerCase().includes(sv)):genres;const tbody=document.getElementById('genresTableBody');if(!f.length){document.getElementById('genresTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('genresEmpty').style.display='block';return;}document.getElementById('genresTable').style.display='table';document.getElementById('genresEmpty').style.display='none';tbody.innerHTML='';f.forEach(g=>{tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td>'+g.id+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(g.name)+'</td><td><code>'+escapeHtml(g.code)+'</code></td><td>'+(g.created_at?new Date(g.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'):'-')+'</td><td><div class="table-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-edit" onclick="editGenre('+g.id+')">编辑</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-delete" onclick="confirmDelete(\'genre\','+g.id+',\''+escapeHtml(g.name)+'\')">删除</button></div></td></tr>';});}
    document.getElementById('genreSearch').addEventListener('input',()=>loadGenres());
    function openGenreModal(gd){document.getElementById('genreModalTitle').textContent=gd?'编辑题材':'添加题材';document.getElementById('genreId').value=gd?gd.id:'';document.getElementById('genreName').value=gd?gd.name:'';document.getElementById('genreCode').value=gd?gd.code:'';document.getElementById('genreModal').classList.add('active');}
    function editGenre(id){fetch(ADMIN_API+'/genres').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{if(d.success){const g=d.data.find(x=>x.id===id);if(g)openGenreModal(g);}});}
    async function saveGenre(){const id=document.getElementById('genreId').value;const name=document.getElementById('genreName').value.trim();const code=document.getElementById('genreCode').value.trim();if(!name||!code){showToast('名称和代码不能为空','error');return;}try{const r=await fetch(id?ADMIN_API+'/genres/'+id:ADMIN_API+'/genres',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({name,code})});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('genreModal');loadGenres();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    async function loadDirectors(){document.getElementById('directorsLoading').style.display='block';document.getElementById('directorsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('directorsEmpty').style.display='none';try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/directors');const d=await r.json();if(d.success){allDirectors=d.data.directors||d.data;renderDirectors(allDirectors);}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}finally{document.getElementById('directorsLoading').style.display='none';}}
    function renderDirectors(directors){const sv=(document.getElementById('directorSearch').value||'').trim().toLowerCase();const f=sv?directors.filter(d=>d.name.toLowerCase().includes(sv)):directors;const tbody=document.getElementById('directorsTableBody');if(!f.length){document.getElementById('directorsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('directorsEmpty').style.display='block';return;}document.getElementById('directorsTable').style.display='table';document.getElementById('directorsEmpty').style.display='none';tbody.innerHTML='';f.forEach(d=>{tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td>'+d.id+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(d.name)+'</td><td>'+(d.avatar_url?'<img src="'+d.avatar_url+'" style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">':'-')+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(d.description||'-')+'</td><td>'+(d.created_at?new Date(d.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'):'-')+'</td><td><div class="table-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-edit" onclick="editDirector('+d.id+')">编辑</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-delete" onclick="confirmDelete(\'director\','+d.id+',\''+escapeHtml(d.name)+'\')">删除</button></div></td></tr>';});}
    document.getElementById('directorSearch').addEventListener('input',()=>renderDirectors(allDirectors));
    function openDirectorModal(dd){document.getElementById('directorModalTitle').textContent=dd?'编辑导演':'添加导演';document.getElementById('directorId').value=dd?dd.id:'';document.getElementById('directorName').value=dd?dd.name:'';document.getElementById('directorAvatarUrl').value=dd?(dd.avatar_url||''):'';document.getElementById('directorDescription').value=dd?(dd.description||''):'';document.getElementById('directorModal').classList.add('active');}
    function editDirector(id){const d=allDirectors.find(x=>x.id===id);if(d)openDirectorModal(d);}
    async function saveDirector(){const id=document.getElementById('directorId').value;const name=document.getElementById('directorName').value.trim();if(!name){showToast('名称不能为空','error');return;}const body={name,avatar_url:document.getElementById('directorAvatarUrl').value.trim(),description:document.getElementById('directorDescription').value.trim()};try{const r=await fetch(id?ADMIN_API+'/directors/'+id:ADMIN_API+'/directors',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('directorModal');loadDirectors();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    async function loadActors(){document.getElementById('actorsLoading').style.display='block';document.getElementById('actorsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('actorsEmpty').style.display='none';try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/actors');const d=await r.json();if(d.success){allActors=d.data.actors||d.data;renderActors(allActors);}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}finally{document.getElementById('actorsLoading').style.display='none';}}
    function renderActors(actors){const sv=(document.getElementById('actorSearch').value||'').trim().toLowerCase();const f=sv?actors.filter(a=>a.name.toLowerCase().includes(sv)):actors;const tbody=document.getElementById('actorsTableBody');if(!f.length){document.getElementById('actorsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('actorsEmpty').style.display='block';return;}document.getElementById('actorsTable').style.display='table';document.getElementById('actorsEmpty').style.display='none';tbody.innerHTML='';f.forEach(a=>{tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td>'+a.id+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(a.name)+'</td><td>'+(a.avatar_url?'<img src="'+a.avatar_url+'" style="width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;" onerror="this.style.display=\'none\'">':'-')+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(a.description||'-')+'</td><td>'+(a.created_at?new Date(a.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'):'-')+'</td><td><div class="table-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-edit" onclick="editActor('+a.id+')">编辑</button><button class="btn btn-sm btn-delete" onclick="confirmDelete(\'actor\','+a.id+',\''+escapeHtml(a.name)+'\')">删除</button></div></td></tr>';});}
    document.getElementById('actorSearch').addEventListener('input',()=>renderActors(allActors));
    function openActorModal(ad){document.getElementById('actorModalTitle').textContent=ad?'编辑演员':'添加演员';document.getElementById('actorId').value=ad?ad.id:'';document.getElementById('actorName').value=ad?ad.name:'';document.getElementById('actorAvatarUrl').value=ad?(ad.avatar_url||''):'';document.getElementById('actorDescription').value=ad?(ad.description||''):'';document.getElementById('actorModal').classList.add('active');}
    function editActor(id){const a=allActors.find(x=>x.id===id);if(a)openActorModal(a);}
    async function saveActor(){const id=document.getElementById('actorId').value;const name=document.getElementById('actorName').value.trim();if(!name){showToast('名称不能为空','error');return;}const body={name,avatar_url:document.getElementById('actorAvatarUrl').value.trim(),description:document.getElementById('actorDescription').value.trim()};try{const r=await fetch(id?ADMIN_API+'/actors/'+id:ADMIN_API+'/actors',{method:id?'PUT':'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('actorModal');loadActors();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    let currentUserPage=1; const USER_PAGE_SIZE=20;
    async function loadUsers(page=currentUserPage){currentUserPage=page;document.getElementById('usersLoading').style.display='block';document.getElementById('usersTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('usersEmpty').style.display='none';if(document.getElementById('usersPagination'))document.getElementById('usersPagination').style.display='none';try{const r=await fetch(USER_API+'/users?page='+page+'&limit='+USER_PAGE_SIZE);const d=await r.json();if(d.success){allUsers=d.data;renderUsers(d.data);renderUsersPagination(d.total,d.page,d.totalPages);}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}finally{document.getElementById('usersLoading').style.display='none';}}
    function renderUsersPagination(total,page,totalPages){const p=document.getElementById('usersPagination');if(!p||!totalPages||totalPages<=1){if(p)p.style.display='none';return;}p.style.display='flex';p.innerHTML='<button '+(page<=1?'disabled':'')+' onclick="loadUsers('+(page-1)+')">上一页</button><span>第 '+page+' / '+totalPages+' 页（共 '+total+' 条）</span><button '+(page>=totalPages?'disabled':'')+' onclick="loadUsers('+(page+1)+')">下一页</button>';}
    function renderUsers(users){const sv=(document.getElementById('userSearch').value||'').trim().toLowerCase();const f=sv?users.filter(u=>u.username.toLowerCase().includes(sv)):users;const tbody=document.getElementById('usersTableBody');if(!f.length){document.getElementById('usersTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('usersEmpty').style.display='block';return;}document.getElementById('usersTable').style.display='table';document.getElementById('usersEmpty').style.display='none';tbody.innerHTML='';f.forEach(u=>{const r=u.role_id===1?'<span class="badge badge-admin">管理员</span>':'<span class="badge badge-user">普通用户</span>';tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td>'+u.id+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(u.username)+'</td><td>'+(u.email||'-')+'</td><td>'+r+'</td><td>'+(u.created_at?new Date(u.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'):'-')+'</td><td><div class="table-actions"><button class="btn btn-sm btn-edit" onclick="openUserEditModal('+u.id+')">编辑</button></div></td></tr>';});}
    document.getElementById('userSearch').addEventListener('input',()=>renderUsers(allUsers));
    let userEditTarget=null;
    function openUserEditModal(userId){const u=allUsers.find(x=>x.id===userId);if(!u){showToast('未找到用户','error');return;}userEditTarget=u;document.getElementById('userEditDisplayName').textContent=u.username;document.getElementById('userEditDisplayRole').textContent='当前角色：'+(u.role_id===1?'管理员':'普通用户');const rb=document.getElementById('userEditRoleBtn');if(u.role_id===1){rb.textContent='降级为普通用户';rb.className='btn btn-sm btn-warning';rb.onclick=function(){changeUserRole(u.id,2);};}else{rb.textContent='升级为管理员';rb.className='btn btn-sm btn-success';rb.onclick=function(){changeUserRole(u.id,1);};}document.getElementById('userEditPassword').value='';document.getElementById('userEditModal').classList.add('active');}
    async function changeUserRole(userId,newRoleId){const u=allUsers.find(x=>x.id===userId);if(!confirm('确定要'+(newRoleId===1?'升级':'降级')+'用户 "'+u.username+'" 吗？'))return;try{const r=await fetch(USER_API+'/users/'+userId,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({role_id:newRoleId})});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('userEditModal');loadUsers();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    async function resetUserPassword(){const u=userEditTarget;if(!u){showToast('未指定用户','error');return;}const np=document.getElementById('userEditPassword').value.trim();if(!np){showToast('请输入密码','error');return;}if(np.length<6){showToast('密码长度不少于6位','error');return;}try{const r=await fetch(USER_API+'/users/'+u.id,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({password:np})});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast('密码重置成功','success');document.getElementById('userEditPassword').value='';}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    function deleteCurrentUser(){const u=userEditTarget;if(!u){showToast('未指定用户','error');return;}closeModal('userEditModal');confirmDelete('user',u.id,u.username);}
    function openUserModal(mode,ud){userModalMode=mode;userEditId=ud?ud.id:null;document.getElementById('userModalTitle').textContent=mode==='edit'?'编辑用户':'添加用户';document.getElementById('userId').value=ud?ud.id:'';document.getElementById('formUsername').value=ud?ud.username:'';document.getElementById('formEmail').value=ud?(ud.email||''):'';document.getElementById('formPassword').value='';document.getElementById('formRole').value=ud?(ud.role_id===1?'1':'2'):'2';if(mode==='edit'){document.getElementById('passwordGroup').style.display='none';document.getElementById('formUsername').disabled=true;}else{document.getElementById('passwordGroup').style.display='block';document.getElementById('formUsername').disabled=false;}document.getElementById('userModal').classList.add('active');}
    async function saveUser(){const username=document.getElementById('formUsername').value.trim();const email=document.getElementById('formEmail').value.trim();const password=document.getElementById('formPassword').value;const role_id=parseInt(document.getElementById('formRole').value);if(userModalMode==='add'&&(!username||!password)){showToast('用户名和密码不能为空','error');return;}try{let url,method,body;if(userModalMode==='edit'){url=USER_API+'/users/'+userEditId;method='PUT';body={email,role_id};if(password)body.password=password;}else{url=USER_API+'/users';method='POST';body={username,email,password,role_id};}const r=await fetch(url,{method,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(body)});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('userModal');loadUsers();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    function confirmDelete(type,id,name){document.getElementById('deleteMessage').textContent='确定要删除"'+name+'"吗？此操作不可恢复。';document.getElementById('deleteModal').classList.add('active');document.getElementById('confirmDeleteBtn').onclick=async()=>{try{const url=type==='user'?USER_API+'/users/'+id:ADMIN_API+'/'+type+'s/'+id;const r=await fetch(url,{method:'DELETE'});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('deleteModal');switch(type){case'movie':loadMovies();break;case'tag':loadTags();break;case'director':loadDirectors();break;case'actor':loadActors();break;case'user':loadUsers();break;}}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}};}
    function escapeHtml(text){if(!text)return'';const d=document.createElement('div');d.textContent=text;return d.innerHTML;}
    let commentPage=1,commentPageSize=20,commentTotal=0,commentSearchKeyword='';
    async function loadComments(){document.getElementById('commentsLoading').style.display='block';document.getElementById('commentsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('commentsEmpty').style.display='none';document.getElementById('commentsPagination').style.display='none';try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/comments?page='+commentPage+'&pageSize='+commentPageSize+(commentSearchKeyword?'&search='+encodeURIComponent(commentSearchKeyword):''));const d=await r.json();if(d.success){commentTotal=d.data.total;renderComments(d.data.comments);renderCommentPagination();}else{showToast(d.message,'error');document.getElementById('commentsEmpty').style.display='block';}}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');document.getElementById('commentsEmpty').style.display='block';}finally{document.getElementById('commentsLoading').style.display='none';}}
    function renderComments(comments){const tbody=document.getElementById('commentsTableBody');if(!comments||!comments.length){document.getElementById('commentsTable').style.display='none';document.getElementById('commentsEmpty').style.display='block';return;}document.getElementById('commentsTable').style.display='table';document.getElementById('commentsEmpty').style.display='none';tbody.innerHTML='';comments.forEach(c=>{const isReply=c.parent_id!==null;const pbt=c.is_pinned?'btn-warning':'btn btn-sm btn-success';const tc=c.content&&c.content.length>50?escapeHtml(c.content.substring(0,50))+'...':escapeHtml(c.content||'');tbody.innerHTML+='<tr><td>'+c.id+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(c.username)+'</td><td>'+escapeHtml(c.movie_title||'-')+'</td><td title="'+escapeHtml(c.content||'')+'">'+tc+'</td><td><span class="tag">'+(isReply?'回复':'评论')+'</span></td><td>'+(c.is_pinned?'<span style="color:#d4a017;font-weight:bold;">★ 已置顶</span>':'否')+'</td><td>'+(c.created_at?new Date(c.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'):'-')+'</td><td><div class="table-actions">'+(!isReply?'<button class="btn btn-sm '+pbt+'" onclick="togglePin('+c.id+','+(!c.is_pinned)+')">'+(c.is_pinned?'取消置顶':'置顶')+'</button>':'')+'<button class="btn btn-sm btn-delete" onclick="confirmDeleteComment('+c.id+')">删除</button></div></td></tr>';});}
    function renderCommentPagination(){const p=document.getElementById('commentsPagination');const tp=Math.ceil(commentTotal/commentPageSize);if(tp<=1){p.style.display='none';return;}p.style.display='flex';p.innerHTML='<button '+(commentPage<=1?'disabled':'')+' onclick="commentPage--;loadComments()">上一页</button><span>第 '+commentPage+' / '+tp+' 页 (共 '+commentTotal+' 条)</span><button '+(commentPage>=tp?'disabled':'')+' onclick="commentPage++;loadComments()">下一页</button>';}
    function searchComments(){commentSearchKeyword=document.getElementById('commentSearch').value.trim();commentPage=1;loadComments();}
    document.getElementById('commentSearch').addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')searchComments();});
    async function togglePin(commentId,pinState){try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/comments/'+commentId+'/pin',{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({isPinned:pinState})});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');loadComments();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    function confirmDeleteComment(commentId){document.getElementById('deleteMessage').textContent='确定要删除这条评论吗？';document.getElementById('deleteModal').classList.add('active');document.getElementById('confirmDeleteBtn').onclick=async()=>{try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/comments/'+commentId,{method:'DELETE'});const d=await r.json();if(d.success){showToast(d.message,'success');closeModal('deleteModal');loadComments();}else showToast(d.message,'error');}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}};}
    let profileAdminId=null;
    async function loadProfile(){if(!checkAuth())return;try{const cu=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('currentUser')||'null');const at=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('adminToken')||'null');profileAdminId=(cu&&cu.role_id===1?cu.id:null)||(at&&at.id?at.id:null);if(!profileAdminId){showToast('无法获取管理员ID','error');return;}const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/profile/'+profileAdminId);const j=await r.json();if(j.success){const d=j.data;document.getElementById('infoUsername').textContent=d.username||'-';document.getElementById('infoCreatedAt').textContent=d.created_at?new Date(d.created_at).toLocaleString('zh-CN'):'-';document.getElementById('profileDisplayName').textContent=d.username||'管理员';document.getElementById('adminName').textContent=d.username||'管理员';const initial=(d.username||'管').charAt(0);const a=document.getElementById('profileAvatar');a.textContent=initial;if(d.avatar_url){const img=new Image();img.src=d.avatar_url;img.onerror=function(){a.textContent=initial;};img.onload=function(){a.innerHTML='';a.appendChild(img);};}document.getElementById('editEmail').value=d.email||'';document.getElementById('editAvatarUrl').value=d.avatar_url||'';}else{showToast(j.message||'加载信息失败','error');}}catch(e){console.error('加载个人信息失败:',e);showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    async function saveProfile(){if(!checkAuth()||!profileAdminId)return;const email=document.getElementById('editEmail').value.trim();const avatar_url=document.getElementById('editAvatarUrl').value.trim();if(email&&!/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email)){showToast('请输入有效的邮箱地址','error');return;}try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/profile/'+profileAdminId,{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({email,avatar_url})});const j=await r.json();if(j.success){showToast('资料更新成功','success');loadProfile();}else{showToast(j.message||'更新失败','error');}}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    function checkPasswordStrength(){const p=document.getElementById('newPassword').value;const b=[document.getElementById('str1'),document.getElementById('str2'),document.getElementById('str3'),document.getElementById('str4')];const t=document.getElementById('strengthText');b.forEach(x=>x.className='strength-bar');t.textContent='';if(!p)return;let s=0;if(p.length>=6)s++;if(p.length>=10)s++;if(/[A-Z]/.test(p)&&/[a-z]/.test(p))s++;if(/[0-9]/.test(p)&&/[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(p))s++;const l=['weak','weak','medium','medium','strong'];const lb=['','弱','较弱','中等','强'];for(let i=0;i<s;i++)b[i].className='strength-bar '+l[s];t.textContent='密码强度：'+lb[s];}
    function clearPasswordForm(){document.getElementById('oldPassword').value='';document.getElementById('newPassword').value='';document.getElementById('confirmPassword').value='';document.getElementById('strengthText').textContent='';['str1','str2','str3','str4'].forEach(i=>document.getElementById(i).className='strength-bar');}
    async function changePassword(){if(!checkAuth()||!profileAdminId)return;const op=document.getElementById('oldPassword').value;const np=document.getElementById('newPassword').value;const cp=document.getElementById('confirmPassword').value;if(!op){showToast('请输入当前密码','error');return;}if(!np){showToast('请输入新密码','error');return;}if(np.length<6){showToast('新密码长度不能少于6位','error');return;}if(np!==cp){showToast('两次输入的新密码不一致','error');return;}if(op===np){showToast('新密码不能与当前密码相同','error');return;}try{const r=await fetch(ADMIN_API+'/profile/'+profileAdminId+'/password',{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({oldPassword:op,newPassword:np})});const j=await r.json();if(j.success){showToast('密码修改成功','success');clearPasswordForm();}else{showToast(j.message||'修改失败','error');}}catch(e){showToast('网络错误','error');}}
    const urlParams=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);
    const initialPage=urlParams.get('page')||'dashboard';
    checkAuth(); switchPage(initialPage);
  </script>
</body>
</html>
```


## models/all-MiniLM-L6-v2/train_script.py

```python
import torch.multiprocessing as mp
import threading
import time
import random
import sys
import argparse
import gzip
import json
import logging
import tqdm
import torch
from torch import nn
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader
import torch
import torch_xla
import torch_xla.core
import torch_xla.core.functions
import torch_xla.core.xla_model as xm
import torch_xla.distributed.xla_multiprocessing as xmp
import torch_xla.distributed.parallel_loader as pl
import os
from shutil import copyfile
from transformers import (
    AdamW,
    AutoModel,
    AutoTokenizer,
    get_linear_schedule_with_warmup,
    set_seed,
)
class AutoModelForSentenceEmbedding(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, model_name, tokenizer, normalize=True):
        super(AutoModelForSentenceEmbedding, self).__init__()
        self.model = AutoModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        self.normalize = normalize
        self.tokenizer = tokenizer
    def forward(self, **kwargs):
        model_output = self.model(**kwargs)
        embeddings = self.mean_pooling(model_output, kwargs['attention_mask'])
        if self.normalize:
            embeddings = torch.nn.functional.normalize(embeddings, p=2, dim=1)
        return embeddings
    def mean_pooling(self, model_output, attention_mask):
        token_embeddings = model_output[0]
        input_mask_expanded = attention_mask.unsqueeze(-1).expand(token_embeddings.size()).float()
        return torch.sum(token_embeddings * input_mask_expanded, 1) / torch.clamp(input_mask_expanded.sum(1), min=1e-9)
    def save_pretrained(self, output_path):
        if xm.is_master_ordinal():
            self.tokenizer.save_pretrained(output_path)
            self.model.config.save_pretrained(output_path)
        xm.save(self.model.state_dict(), os.path.join(output_path, "pytorch_model.bin"))
def train_function(index, args, queue):
    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(args.model)
    model = AutoModelForSentenceEmbedding(args.model, tokenizer)
    device = xm.xla_device()
    model = model.to(device)
    optimizer = AdamW(params=model.parameters(), lr=2e-5, correct_bias=True)
    lr_scheduler = get_linear_schedule_with_warmup(
        optimizer=optimizer,
        num_warmup_steps=500,
        num_training_steps=args.steps,
    )
    cross_entropy_loss = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()
    max_grad_norm = 1
    model.train()
    for global_step in tqdm.trange(args.steps, disable=not xm.is_master_ordinal()):
        batch = queue.get()
        if len(batch[0]) == 2:
            text1 = tokenizer([b[0] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            text2 = tokenizer([b[1] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            embeddings_a = model(**text1.to(device))
            embeddings_b = model(**text2.to(device))
            embeddings_a = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_a)
            embeddings_b = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_b)
            scores = torch.mm(embeddings_a, embeddings_b.transpose(0, 1)) * args.scale
            labels = torch.tensor(range(len(scores)), dtype=torch.long, device=embeddings_a.device)
            loss = (cross_entropy_loss(scores, labels) + cross_entropy_loss(scores.transpose(0, 1), labels)) / 2
        else:
            text1 = tokenizer([b[0] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            text2 = tokenizer([b[1] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            text3 = tokenizer([b[2] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            embeddings_a  = model(**text1.to(device))
            embeddings_b1 = model(**text2.to(device))
            embeddings_b2 = model(**text3.to(device))
            embeddings_a  = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_a)
            embeddings_b1 = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_b1)
            embeddings_b2 = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_b2)
            embeddings_b = torch.cat([embeddings_b1, embeddings_b2])
            scores = torch.mm(embeddings_a, embeddings_b.transpose(0, 1)) * args.scale
            labels = torch.tensor(range(len(scores)), dtype=torch.long, device=embeddings_a.device)
            loss = cross_entropy_loss(scores, labels)
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), max_grad_norm)
        xm.optimizer_step(optimizer, barrier=True)
        lr_scheduler.step()
        if (global_step+1) % args.save_steps == 0:
            output_path = os.path.join(args.output, str(global_step+1))
            xm.master_print("save model: "+output_path)
            model.save_pretrained(output_path)
    output_path = os.path.join(args.output, "final")
    xm.master_print("save model final: "+ output_path)
    model.save_pretrained(output_path)
def produce_data(args, queue, filepaths, dataset_indices):
    global_batch_size = args.batch_size*args.nprocs
    size_per_dataset = int(global_batch_size / args.datasets_per_batch)
    num_same_dataset = int(size_per_dataset / args.batch_size)
    print("producer", "global_batch_size", global_batch_size)
    print("producer", "size_per_dataset", size_per_dataset)
    print("producer", "num_same_dataset", num_same_dataset)
    datasets = []
    for filepath in filepaths:
        if "reddit_" in filepath:
            data_obj = RedditDataset(filepath)
        else:
            data_obj = Dataset(filepath)
        datasets.append(iter(data_obj))
    num_cols = {idx: len(next(dataset)) for idx, dataset in enumerate(datasets)}
    while True:
        texts_in_batch = set()
        batch_format = None
        for _ in range(args.datasets_per_batch):
            valid_dataset = False
            while not valid_dataset:
                data_idx = random.choice(dataset_indices)
                if batch_format is None:
                    batch_format = num_cols[data_idx]
                    valid_dataset = True
                else:
                    valid_dataset = (batch_format == num_cols[data_idx])
            dataset = datasets[data_idx]
            for _ in range(num_same_dataset):
                for _ in range(args.nprocs):
                    batch_device = []
                    while len(batch_device) < args.batch_size:
                        sample = next(dataset)
                        in_batch = False
                        for text in sample:
                            if text in texts_in_batch:
                                in_batch = True
                                break
                        if not in_batch:
                            for text in sample:
                                texts_in_batch.add(text)
                            batch_device.append(sample)
                    queue.put(batch_device)
class RedditDataset:
    def __init__(self, filepath):
        self.filepath = filepath
    def __iter__(self):
        while True:
            with gzip.open(self.filepath, "rt") as fIn:
                    for line in fIn:
                        data = json.loads(line)
                        if "response" in data and "context" in data:
                            yield [data["response"], data["context"]]
class Dataset:
    def __init__(self, filepath):
        self.filepath = filepath
    def __iter__(self):
        max_dataset_size = 10*1000*1000
        dataset = []
        data_format = None
        while dataset is None or len(dataset) == 0:
            with gzip.open(self.filepath, "rt") as fIn:
                for line in fIn:
                    data = json.loads(line)
                    if isinstance(data, dict):
                        data = data['texts']
                    if data_format is None:
                        data_format = len(data)
                    assert len(data) == data_format
                    if dataset is not None:
                        dataset.append(data)
                        if len(dataset) >= max_dataset_size:
                            dataset = None
                    yield data
        while True:
            random.shuffle(dataset)
            for data in dataset:
                yield data
if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('--model', default='nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased')
    parser.add_argument('--steps', type=int, default=2000)
    parser.add_argument('--save_steps', type=int, default=10000)
    parser.add_argument('--batch_size', type=int, default=64)
    parser.add_argument('--max_length', type=int, default=128)
    parser.add_argument('--nprocs', type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument('--datasets_per_batch', type=int, default=2, help="Number of datasets per batch")
    parser.add_argument('--scale', type=float, default=20, help="Use 20 for cossim, and 1 when you work with unnormalized embeddings with dot product")
    parser.add_argument('--data_folder', default="/data", help="Folder with your dataset files")
    parser.add_argument('data_config', help="A data_config.json file")
    parser.add_argument('output')
    args = parser.parse_args()
    assert (args.batch_size*args.nprocs) % args.datasets_per_batch == 0
    logging.info("Output: "+args.output)
    if os.path.exists(args.output):
        print("Output folder already exists.")
        input("Continue?")
    os.makedirs(args.output, exist_ok=True)
    data_config_path = os.path.join(args.output, 'data_config.json')
    copyfile(args.data_config, data_config_path)
    train_script_path = os.path.join(args.output, 'train_script.py')
    copyfile(__file__, train_script_path)
    with open(train_script_path, 'a') as fOut:
        fOut.write("\n\n
    with open(args.data_config) as fIn:
        data_config = json.load(fIn)
    queue = mp.Queue(maxsize=100*args.nprocs)
    filepaths = []
    dataset_indices = []
    for idx, data in enumerate(data_config):
        filepaths.append(os.path.join(os.path.expanduser(args.data_folder), data['name']))
        dataset_indices.extend([idx]*data['weight'])
    p = mp.Process(target=produce_data, args=(args, queue, filepaths, dataset_indices))
    p.start()
    print("Start processes:", args.nprocs)
    xmp.spawn(train_function, args=(args, queue), nprocs=args.nprocs, start_method='fork')
    print("Training done")
    print("It might be that not all processes exit automatically. In that case you must manually kill this process.")
    print("With 'pkill python' you can kill all remaining python processes")
    p.kill()
    exit()
```


## models/train_script.py

```python
import torch.multiprocessing as mp
import threading
import time
import random
import sys
import argparse
import gzip
import json
import logging
import tqdm
import torch
from torch import nn
from torch.utils.data import DataLoader
import torch
import torch_xla
import torch_xla.core
import torch_xla.core.functions
import torch_xla.core.xla_model as xm
import torch_xla.distributed.xla_multiprocessing as xmp
import torch_xla.distributed.parallel_loader as pl
import os
from shutil import copyfile
from transformers import (
    AdamW,
    AutoModel,
    AutoTokenizer,
    get_linear_schedule_with_warmup,
    set_seed,
)
class AutoModelForSentenceEmbedding(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, model_name, tokenizer, normalize=True):
        super(AutoModelForSentenceEmbedding, self).__init__()
        self.model = AutoModel.from_pretrained(model_name)
        self.normalize = normalize
        self.tokenizer = tokenizer
    def forward(self, **kwargs):
        model_output = self.model(**kwargs)
        embeddings = self.mean_pooling(model_output, kwargs['attention_mask'])
        if self.normalize:
            embeddings = torch.nn.functional.normalize(embeddings, p=2, dim=1)
        return embeddings
    def mean_pooling(self, model_output, attention_mask):
        token_embeddings = model_output[0]
        input_mask_expanded = attention_mask.unsqueeze(-1).expand(token_embeddings.size()).float()
        return torch.sum(token_embeddings * input_mask_expanded, 1) / torch.clamp(input_mask_expanded.sum(1), min=1e-9)
    def save_pretrained(self, output_path):
        if xm.is_master_ordinal():
            self.tokenizer.save_pretrained(output_path)
            self.model.config.save_pretrained(output_path)
        xm.save(self.model.state_dict(), os.path.join(output_path, "pytorch_model.bin"))
def train_function(index, args, queue):
    tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(args.model)
    model = AutoModelForSentenceEmbedding(args.model, tokenizer)
    device = xm.xla_device()
    model = model.to(device)
    optimizer = AdamW(params=model.parameters(), lr=2e-5, correct_bias=True)
    lr_scheduler = get_linear_schedule_with_warmup(
        optimizer=optimizer,
        num_warmup_steps=500,
        num_training_steps=args.steps,
    )
    cross_entropy_loss = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()
    max_grad_norm = 1
    model.train()
    for global_step in tqdm.trange(args.steps, disable=not xm.is_master_ordinal()):
        batch = queue.get()
        if len(batch[0]) == 2:
            text1 = tokenizer([b[0] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            text2 = tokenizer([b[1] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            embeddings_a = model(**text1.to(device))
            embeddings_b = model(**text2.to(device))
            embeddings_a = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_a)
            embeddings_b = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_b)
            scores = torch.mm(embeddings_a, embeddings_b.transpose(0, 1)) * args.scale
            labels = torch.tensor(range(len(scores)), dtype=torch.long, device=embeddings_a.device)
            loss = (cross_entropy_loss(scores, labels) + cross_entropy_loss(scores.transpose(0, 1), labels)) / 2
        else:
            text1 = tokenizer([b[0] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            text2 = tokenizer([b[1] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            text3 = tokenizer([b[2] for b in batch], return_tensors="pt", max_length=args.max_length, truncation=True, padding="max_length")
            embeddings_a  = model(**text1.to(device))
            embeddings_b1 = model(**text2.to(device))
            embeddings_b2 = model(**text3.to(device))
            embeddings_a  = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_a)
            embeddings_b1 = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_b1)
            embeddings_b2 = torch_xla.core.functions.all_gather(embeddings_b2)
            embeddings_b = torch.cat([embeddings_b1, embeddings_b2])
            scores = torch.mm(embeddings_a, embeddings_b.transpose(0, 1)) * args.scale
            labels = torch.tensor(range(len(scores)), dtype=torch.long, device=embeddings_a.device)
            loss = cross_entropy_loss(scores, labels)
        optimizer.zero_grad()
        loss.backward()
        torch.nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_(model.parameters(), max_grad_norm)
        xm.optimizer_step(optimizer, barrier=True)
        lr_scheduler.step()
        if (global_step+1) % args.save_steps == 0:
            output_path = os.path.join(args.output, str(global_step+1))
            xm.master_print("save model: "+output_path)
            model.save_pretrained(output_path)
    output_path = os.path.join(args.output, "final")
    xm.master_print("save model final: "+ output_path)
    model.save_pretrained(output_path)
def produce_data(args, queue, filepaths, dataset_indices):
    global_batch_size = args.batch_size*args.nprocs
    size_per_dataset = int(global_batch_size / args.datasets_per_batch)
    num_same_dataset = int(size_per_dataset / args.batch_size)
    print("producer", "global_batch_size", global_batch_size)
    print("producer", "size_per_dataset", size_per_dataset)
    print("producer", "num_same_dataset", num_same_dataset)
    datasets = []
    for filepath in filepaths:
        if "reddit_" in filepath:
            data_obj = RedditDataset(filepath)
        else:
            data_obj = Dataset(filepath)
        datasets.append(iter(data_obj))
    num_cols = {idx: len(next(dataset)) for idx, dataset in enumerate(datasets)}
    while True:
        texts_in_batch = set()
        batch_format = None
        for _ in range(args.datasets_per_batch):
            valid_dataset = False
            while not valid_dataset:
                data_idx = random.choice(dataset_indices)
                if batch_format is None:
                    batch_format = num_cols[data_idx]
                    valid_dataset = True
                else:
                    valid_dataset = (batch_format == num_cols[data_idx])
            dataset = datasets[data_idx]
            for _ in range(num_same_dataset):
                for _ in range(args.nprocs):
                    batch_device = []
                    while len(batch_device) < args.batch_size:
                        sample = next(dataset)
                        in_batch = False
                        for text in sample:
                            if text in texts_in_batch:
                                in_batch = True
                                break
                        if not in_batch:
                            for text in sample:
                                texts_in_batch.add(text)
                            batch_device.append(sample)
                    queue.put(batch_device)
class RedditDataset:
    def __init__(self, filepath):
        self.filepath = filepath
    def __iter__(self):
        while True:
            with gzip.open(self.filepath, "rt") as fIn:
                    for line in fIn:
                        data = json.loads(line)
                        if "response" in data and "context" in data:
                            yield [data["response"], data["context"]]
class Dataset:
    def __init__(self, filepath):
        self.filepath = filepath
    def __iter__(self):
        max_dataset_size = 10*1000*1000
        dataset = []
        data_format = None
        while dataset is None or len(dataset) == 0:
            with gzip.open(self.filepath, "rt") as fIn:
                for line in fIn:
                    data = json.loads(line)
                    if isinstance(data, dict):
                        data = data['texts']
                    if data_format is None:
                        data_format = len(data)
                    assert len(data) == data_format
                    if dataset is not None:
                        dataset.append(data)
                        if len(dataset) >= max_dataset_size:
                            dataset = None
                    yield data
        while True:
            random.shuffle(dataset)
            for data in dataset:
                yield data
if __name__ == "__main__":
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('--model', default='nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased')
    parser.add_argument('--steps', type=int, default=2000)
    parser.add_argument('--save_steps', type=int, default=10000)
    parser.add_argument('--batch_size', type=int, default=64)
    parser.add_argument('--max_length', type=int, default=128)
    parser.add_argument('--nprocs', type=int, default=8)
    parser.add_argument('--datasets_per_batch', type=int, default=2, help="Number of datasets per batch")
    parser.add_argument('--scale', type=float, default=20, help="Use 20 for cossim, and 1 when you work with unnormalized embeddings with dot product")
    parser.add_argument('--data_folder', default="/data", help="Folder with your dataset files")
    parser.add_argument('data_config', help="A data_config.json file")
    parser.add_argument('output')
    args = parser.parse_args()
    assert (args.batch_size*args.nprocs) % args.datasets_per_batch == 0
    logging.info("Output: "+args.output)
    if os.path.exists(args.output):
        print("Output folder already exists.")
        input("Continue?")
    os.makedirs(args.output, exist_ok=True)
    data_config_path = os.path.join(args.output, 'data_config.json')
    copyfile(args.data_config, data_config_path)
    train_script_path = os.path.join(args.output, 'train_script.py')
    copyfile(__file__, train_script_path)
    with open(train_script_path, 'a') as fOut:
        fOut.write("\n\n
    with open(args.data_config) as fIn:
        data_config = json.load(fIn)
    queue = mp.Queue(maxsize=100*args.nprocs)
    filepaths = []
    dataset_indices = []
    for idx, data in enumerate(data_config):
        filepaths.append(os.path.join(os.path.expanduser(args.data_folder), data['name']))
        dataset_indices.extend([idx]*data['weight'])
    p = mp.Process(target=produce_data, args=(args, queue, filepaths, dataset_indices))
    p.start()
    print("Start processes:", args.nprocs)
    xmp.spawn(train_function, args=(args, queue), nprocs=args.nprocs, start_method='fork')
    print("Training done")
    print("It might be that not all processes exit automatically. In that case you must manually kill this process.")
    print("With 'pkill python' you can kill all remaining python processes")
    p.kill()
    exit()
```

## scripts/analysis/ab_analysis.py

```python
import json
import logging
import time
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from typing import List, Dict, Optional, Any, Tuple
import pymysql
import redis
import config as cfg
from stat_utils import (
    compute_proportion_ci,
    two_proportion_z_test,
    mean_comparison_test,
    minimum_sample_size,
    compute_win_probability,
)
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(message)s',
)
logger = logging.getLogger('ab_analysis')
def get_mysql_connection():
    return pymysql.connect(**cfg.MYSQL_CONFIG)
def get_redis_connection():
    return redis.Redis(**cfg.REDIS_CONFIG)
def load_experiments(conn) -> List[Dict]:
    with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cursor:
        cursor.execute(
            "SELECT * FROM ab_experiments WHERE status = 'running'"
        )
        experiments = cursor.fetchall()
        for exp in experiments:
            cursor.execute(
                "SELECT * FROM ab_strategies WHERE experiment_id = %s ORDER BY id",
                (exp['id'],)
            )
            exp['strategies'] = cursor.fetchall()
    logger.info(f"加载进行中实验 {len(experiments)} 个")
    return experiments
def load_behavior_data(
    conn,
    experiment_id: int,
    strategy_ids: List[int],
    since: datetime
) -> Dict[int, List[Dict]]:
    if not strategy_ids:
        return {}
    placeholders = ','.join(['%s'] * len(strategy_ids))
    sql = f
    params = [experiment_id] + strategy_ids + [since]
    with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cursor:
        cursor.execute(sql, params)
        rows = cursor.fetchall()
    grouped: Dict[int, List[Dict]] = {sid: [] for sid in strategy_ids}
    for row in rows:
        sid = row['strategy_id']
        if sid in grouped:
            grouped[sid].append(row)
    for sid, data in grouped.items():
        logger.info(f"  策略 {sid}: 加载 {len(data)} 条行为记录")
    return grouped
def compute_metrics(
    strategy_id: int,
    behavior_data: List[Dict],
    positive_event_types: tuple = cfg.POSITIVE_EVENT_TYPES,
    positive_rating_threshold: int = cfg.POSITIVE_RATING_THRESHOLD,
) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    total_exposures = len(behavior_data)
    if total_exposures == 0:
        return {
            'strategy_id': strategy_id,
            'total_exposures': 0,
            'total_clicks': 0,
            'total_ratings': 0,
            'total_collects': 0,
            'total_watch_seconds': 0,
            'unique_users': 0,
            'ctr': 0.0,
            'ctr_ci_lower': 0.0,
            'ctr_ci_upper': 0.0,
            'avg_watch_seconds': 0.0,
            'rating_rate': 0.0,
            'rating_rate_ci_lower': 0.0,
            'rating_rate_ci_upper': 0.0,
            'collect_rate': 0.0,
            'collect_rate_ci_lower': 0.0,
            'collect_rate_ci_upper': 0.0,
            'positive_events': 0,
        }
    unique_users = set()
    total_clicks = 0
    total_ratings = 0
    total_collects = 0
    total_watch_seconds = 0
    positive_events = 0
    for row in behavior_data:
        user_id = row.get('user_id')
        if user_id:
            unique_users.add(user_id)
        bt = row.get('behavior_type', '')
        rv = row.get('rating') or 0
        if bt == 'view':
            total_clicks += 1
            positive_events += 1
        elif bt == 'like':
            total_clicks += 1
            positive_events += 1
        elif bt == 'rate':
            total_ratings += 1
            if float(rv) >= positive_rating_threshold:
                positive_events += 1
        elif bt == 'collect':
            total_collects += 1
            positive_events += 1
        elif bt == 'share':
            positive_events += 1
        else:
            ws = float(row.get('duration_seconds') or 0)
            total_watch_seconds += ws
            if ws > 30:
                positive_events += 1
    ctr = positive_events / total_exposures
    rating_rate = total_ratings / total_exposures
    collect_rate = total_collects / total_exposures
    ctr_ci = compute_proportion_ci(positive_events, total_exposures)
    rating_ci = compute_proportion_ci(total_ratings, total_exposures)
    collect_ci = compute_proportion_ci(total_collects, total_exposures)
    avg_watch = total_watch_seconds / len(unique_users) if unique_users else 0.0
    return {
        'strategy_id': strategy_id,
        'total_exposures': total_exposures,
        'total_clicks': total_clicks,
        'total_ratings': total_ratings,
        'total_collects': total_collects,
        'total_watch_seconds': total_watch_seconds,
        'unique_users': len(unique_users),
        'ctr': ctr,
        'ctr_ci_lower': ctr_ci['ci_lower'],
        'ctr_ci_upper': ctr_ci['ci_upper'],
        'avg_watch_seconds': avg_watch,
        'rating_rate': rating_rate,
        'rating_rate_ci_lower': rating_ci['ci_lower'],
        'rating_rate_ci_upper': rating_ci['ci_upper'],
        'collect_rate': collect_rate,
        'collect_rate_ci_lower': collect_ci['ci_lower'],
        'collect_rate_ci_upper': collect_ci['ci_upper'],
        'positive_events': positive_events,
    }
def perform_statistical_tests(
    metrics_by_strategy: Dict[int, Dict],
) -> Dict[int, Dict[str, Any]]:
    control_sid = None
    for sid, m in metrics_by_strategy.items():
        if m.get('is_control', False):
            control_sid = sid
            break
    if control_sid is None:
        control_sid = list(metrics_by_strategy.keys())[0]
    control = metrics_by_strategy[control_sid]
    results = {}
    for sid, strategy in metrics_by_strategy.items():
        if sid == control_sid:
            results[sid] = {
                'p_value': 1.0,
                'is_winner': False,
                'is_control': True,
                'sample_sufficient': True,
                'test_type': 'control',
            }
            continue
        required_n = minimum_sample_size(
            baseline_rate=control['ctr'],
            minimum_effect=0.01,
            alpha=cfg.SIGNIFICANCE_LEVEL,
            power=cfg.STATISTICAL_POWER,
        )
        sample_sufficient = (
            strategy['total_exposures'] >= required_n
            and control['total_exposures'] >= required_n
        )
        if not sample_sufficient:
            results[sid] = {
                'p_value': None,
                'is_winner': False,
                'sample_sufficient': False,
                'test_type': 'insufficient_data',
                'required_sample_size': required_n,
            }
            continue
        z_test = two_proportion_z_test(
            successes_a=strategy['positive_events'],
            trials_a=strategy['total_exposures'],
            successes_b=control['positive_events'],
            trials_b=control['total_exposures'],
        )
        results[sid] = {
            'p_value': z_test['p_value'],
            'is_winner': z_test['significant'] and strategy['ctr'] > control['ctr'],
            'sample_sufficient': True,
            'test_type': 'z_test',
            'z_stat': z_test['z_stat'],
        }
    return results
def update_bandit_params(
    conn,
    redis_client,
    experiment: Dict,
    strategies: List[Dict],
    metrics_by_strategy: Dict[int, Dict],
) -> Dict[int, Tuple[float, float]]:
    updated_params = {}
    for strat in strategies:
        sid = strat['id']
        metrics = metrics_by_strategy.get(sid)
        if metrics is None:
            continue
        if strat.get('coldstart_end_time') and datetime.now() < strat['coldstart_end_time']:
            logger.info(f"  策略 {sid}: 冷启动保护期，跳过 Bandit 更新")
            updated_params[sid] = (float(strat['bandit_alpha']), float(strat['bandit_beta']))
            continue
        positive = metrics['positive_events']
        total = metrics['total_exposures']
        negative = total - positive
        alpha = max(cfg.BETA_PRIOR_ALPHA, cfg.BETA_PRIOR_ALPHA + positive)
        beta = max(cfg.BETA_PRIOR_BETA, cfg.BETA_PRIOR_BETA + negative)
        updated_params[sid] = (alpha, beta)
        with conn.cursor() as cursor:
            cursor.execute(
                "UPDATE ab_strategies SET bandit_alpha = %s, bandit_beta = %s, "
                "weight_source = 'bandit' WHERE id = %s",
                (alpha, beta, sid)
            )
        alpha_key = cfg.REDIS_PREFIX['bandit_alpha'].format(
            exp_id=experiment['id'], strategy_id=sid
        )
        beta_key = cfg.REDIS_PREFIX['bandit_beta'].format(
            exp_id=experiment['id'], strategy_id=sid
        )
        redis_client.set(alpha_key, alpha)
        redis_client.set(beta_key, beta)
        logger.info(f"  策略 {sid}: alpha={alpha:.4f}, beta={beta:.4f}")
    for sid, (alpha, beta) in updated_params.items():
        message = json.dumps({
            'experimentId': experiment['id'],
            'strategyId': sid,
            'alpha': alpha,
            'beta': beta,
            'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat(),
        })
        redis_client.publish(cfg.REDIS_CHANNELS['bandit_update'], message)
    conn.commit()
    return updated_params
def store_results(
    conn,
    experiment: Dict,
    metrics_by_strategy: Dict[int, Dict],
    test_results: Dict[int, Dict],
    bandit_params: Dict[int, Tuple[float, float]],
    period_start: datetime,
    period_end: datetime,
):
    now = datetime.now()
    for strat in experiment['strategies']:
        sid = strat['id']
        metrics = metrics_by_strategy.get(sid)
        test = test_results.get(sid, {})
        bp = bandit_params.get(sid, (1.0, 1.0))
        if metrics is None:
            continue
        with conn.cursor() as cursor:
            cursor.execute(
, {
                'exp_id': experiment['id'],
                'sid': sid,
                'now': now,
                'period_start': period_start,
                'period_end': period_end,
                'exposures': metrics['total_exposures'],
                'clicks': metrics['total_clicks'],
                'ratings': metrics['total_ratings'],
                'collects': metrics['total_collects'],
                'watch_sec': metrics['total_watch_seconds'],
                'users': metrics['unique_users'],
                'ctr': metrics['ctr'],
                'ctr_ci_lower': metrics['ctr_ci_lower'],
                'ctr_ci_upper': metrics['ctr_ci_upper'],
                'avg_watch': metrics['avg_watch_seconds'],
                'rating_rate': metrics['rating_rate'],
                'collect_rate': metrics['collect_rate'],
                'positives': metrics['positive_events'],
                'p_value': test.get('p_value'),
                'is_winner': 1 if test.get('is_winner', False) else 0,
                'is_converged': 0,
                'sample_ok': 1 if test.get('sample_sufficient', False) else 0,
                'alpha': bp[0],
                'beta': bp[1],
            })
    conn.commit()
    logger.info(f"  结果已写入 ab_results")
def check_convergence(
    conn,
    redis_client,
    experiment: Dict,
    bandit_params: Dict[int, Tuple[float, float]],
) -> Optional[int]:
    exp_id = experiment['id']
    start_time = experiment.get('start_time')
    if not start_time:
        return None
    hours_running = (datetime.now() - start_time).total_seconds() / 3600
    if hours_running < cfg.RUN_MINIMUM_HOURS:
        logger.info(f"  实验 {exp_id}: 运行 {hours_running:.1f}h < {cfg.RUN_MINIMUM_HOURS}h, 不进行收敛判定")
        return None
    strategy_params = [
        {'strategy_id': sid, 'alpha': alpha, 'beta': beta}
        for sid, (alpha, beta) in bandit_params.items()
    ]
    win_probs = compute_win_probability(strategy_params, cfg.MONTE_CARLO_SIMULATIONS)
    for sid, prob in win_probs.items():
        logger.info(f"  策略 {sid} 获胜概率: {prob:.4f}")
    best_sid = max(win_probs, key=win_probs.get)
    best_prob = win_probs[best_sid]
    if best_prob < cfg.WIN_PROBABILITY_THRESHOLD:
        logger.info(f"  最佳策略 {best_sid} 获胜概率 {best_prob:.4f} < 阈值 {cfg.WIN_PROBABILITY_THRESHOLD}")
        return None
    with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cursor:
        cursor.execute(
, (exp_id, best_sid, cfg.CONVERGE_CONSECUTIVE_CYCLES))
        recent_results = cursor.fetchall()
    if len(recent_results) < cfg.CONVERGE_CONSECUTIVE_CYCLES:
        logger.info(
            f"  策略 {best_sid} 获胜概率 {best_prob:.4f} 达标 "
            f"但历史记录不足 {cfg.CONVERGE_CONSECUTIVE_CYCLES} 个周期"
        )
        return None
    all_winner = all(r['is_winner'] == 1 for r in recent_results)
    if not all_winner:
        logger.info(f"  策略 {best_sid} 历史记录未连续优胜")
        return None
    logger.info(f"  === 实验 {exp_id} 收敛！策略 {best_sid} 被推全 ===")
    with conn.cursor() as cursor:
        cursor.execute(
            "UPDATE ab_experiments SET status = 'stopped', "
            "winner_strategy_id = %s, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = %s",
            (best_sid, exp_id)
        )
        cursor.execute(
            "UPDATE ab_strategies SET traffic_percentage = 100, "
            "weight_source = 'promoted' WHERE id = %s",
            (best_sid,)
        )
        cursor.execute(
            "UPDATE ab_strategies SET traffic_percentage = 0, "
            "weight_source = 'promoted' WHERE experiment_id = %s AND id != %s",
            (exp_id, best_sid)
        )
        conn.commit()
    message = json.dumps({
        'experimentId': exp_id,
        'winnerStrategyId': best_sid,
        'timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat(),
    })
    redis_client.publish(cfg.REDIS_CHANNELS['experiment_stop'], message)
    return best_sid
def run_analysis():
    start_time = time.time()
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    logger.info("A/B 测试分析开始")
    logger.info("=" * 60)
    conn = get_mysql_connection()
    redis_client = get_redis_connection()
    try:
        experiments = load_experiments(conn)
        if not experiments:
            logger.info("没有进行中的实验，跳过分析")
            return
        period_end = datetime.now()
        period_start = period_end - timedelta(hours=cfg.RECENT_WINDOW_HOURS)
        for exp in experiments:
            exp_id = exp['id']
            strategies = exp['strategies']
            strategy_ids = [s['id'] for s in strategies]
            logger.info(f"\n处理实验
                        f"(模式: {exp['split_mode']}, 策略数: {len(strategies)})")
            behavior_data = load_behavior_data(conn, exp_id, strategy_ids, period_start)
            metrics_by_strategy = {}
            for strat in strategies:
                sid = strat['id']
                data = behavior_data.get(sid, [])
                metrics = compute_metrics(sid, data)
                metrics['is_control'] = bool(strat.get('is_control', False))
                metrics_by_strategy[sid] = metrics
                logger.info(f"  策略 {sid} ({strat['name']}): "
                            f"曝光={metrics['total_exposures']}, "
                            f"CTR={metrics['ctr']:.4f} "
                            f"[{metrics['ctr_ci_lower']:.4f}, {metrics['ctr_ci_upper']:.4f}]")
            test_results = perform_statistical_tests(metrics_by_strategy)
            for sid, tr in test_results.items():
                if tr.get('test_type') == 'insufficient_data':
                    logger.info(f"  策略 {sid}: 样本量不足 (需要 {tr.get('required_sample_size')})")
                elif tr.get('is_control'):
                    logger.info(f"  策略 {sid}: 对照组")
                else:
                    pv = tr.get('p_value', 1.0)
                    logger.info(f"  策略 {sid}: p值={pv:.6f}, "
                                f"{'显著优胜' if tr.get('is_winner') else '未显著'}")
            bandit_params = {}
            if exp['split_mode'] == 'bandit':
                logger.info(f"  更新 Bandit 后验参数...")
                bandit_params = update_bandit_params(
                    conn, redis_client, exp, strategies, metrics_by_strategy
                )
            else:
                for strat in strategies:
                    sid = strat['id']
                    bandit_params[sid] = (
                        float(strat['bandit_alpha']),
                        float(strat['bandit_beta']),
                    )
            store_results(
                conn, exp, metrics_by_strategy, test_results,
                bandit_params, period_start, period_end
            )
            if exp['split_mode'] == 'bandit':
                winner_sid = check_convergence(conn, redis_client, exp, bandit_params)
                if winner_sid:
                    logger.info(f">>> 实验 {exp_id}: 策略 {winner_sid} 自动推全")
                else:
                    logger.info(f"  实验 {exp_id}: 未收敛，继续运行")
        elapsed = time.time() - start_time
        logger.info(f"\n分析完成，耗时 {elapsed:.1f}s")
        logger.info("-" * 60)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"分析过程发生错误: {e}", exc_info=True)
        raise
    finally:
        conn.close()
        redis_client.close()
if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_analysis()
```

## scripts/analysis/run_ab_test.py

```python
import argparse
import logging
import sys
import time
from ab_analysis import run_analysis
logging.basicConfig(
    level=logging.INFO,
    format='%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] run_ab_test: %(message)s',
)
logger = logging.getLogger('run_ab_test')
def run_once():
    logger.info("--- 单次 A/B 测试分析 ---")
    try:
        run_analysis()
        logger.info("分析完成")
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"分析失败: {e}", exc_info=True)
        sys.exit(1)
def run_loop(interval_minutes: int = 30):
    logger.info(f"启动 A/B 测试分析循环，间隔 {interval_minutes} 分钟")
    while True:
        run_once()
        logger.info(f"等待 {interval_minutes} 分钟后进行下一次分析...")
        time.sleep(interval_minutes * 60)
if __name__ == '__main__':
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='A/B 测试分析调度入口')
    parser.add_argument(
        '--once', action='store_true',
        help='单次运行分析（用于 crontab 调度）'
    )
    parser.add_argument(
        '--interval', type=int, default=30,
        help='循环运行间隔（分钟），默认 30'
    )
    args = parser.parse_args()
    if args.once:
        run_once()
    else:
        run_loop(args.interval)
```


## scripts/analysis/stat_utils.py

```python
import math
import random
from typing import Tuple, Optional, Dict, Any
from scipy import stats as scipy_stats
import numpy as np
def compute_proportion_ci(
    successes: int,
    trials: int,
    confidence: float = 0.95
) -> Dict[str, float]:
    if trials <= 0:
        return {'proportion': 0.0, 'ci_lower': 0.0, 'ci_upper': 0.0}
    proportion = successes / trials
    z = scipy_stats.norm.ppf(1 - (1 - confidence) / 2)
    denominator = 1 + z**2 / trials
    center = (proportion + z**2 / (2 * trials)) / denominator
    margin = z * math.sqrt(
        (proportion * (1 - proportion) / trials) +
        (z**2 / (4 * trials**2))
    ) / denominator
    return {
        'proportion': proportion,
        'ci_lower': max(0.0, center - margin),
        'ci_upper': min(1.0, center + margin),
    }
def two_proportion_z_test(
    successes_a: int,
    trials_a: int,
    successes_b: int,
    trials_b: int
) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    if trials_a <= 0 or trials_b <= 0:
        return {'z_stat': 0.0, 'p_value': 1.0, 'significant': False}
    p_a = successes_a / trials_a
    p_b = successes_b / trials_b
    p_pool = (successes_a + successes_b) / (trials_a + trials_b)
    if p_pool * (1 - p_pool) == 0:
        return {'z_stat': 0.0, 'p_value': 1.0, 'significant': False}
    se = math.sqrt(p_pool * (1 - p_pool) * (1 / trials_a + 1 / trials_b))
    if se == 0:
        return {'z_stat': 0.0, 'p_value': 1.0, 'significant': False}
    z_stat = (p_a - p_b) / se
    p_value = 2 * (1 - scipy_stats.norm.cdf(abs(z_stat)))
    return {
        'z_stat': z_stat,
        'p_value': p_value,
        'significant': p_value < 0.05,
    }
def mean_comparison_test(
    values_a: list,
    values_b: list,
    use_nonparametric: bool = False
) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    if len(values_a) < 2 or len(values_b) < 2:
        return {'statistic': 0.0, 'p_value': 1.0, 'significant': False, 'method': 'insufficient_data'}
    if use_nonparametric:
        stat, p_value = scipy_stats.mannwhitneyu(values_a, values_b, alternative='two-sided')
        method = 'mann_whitney_u'
    else:
        stat, p_value = scipy_stats.ttest_ind(values_a, values_b, equal_var=False)
        method = 'welch_t_test'
    return {
        'statistic': stat,
        'p_value': p_value,
        'significant': p_value < 0.05,
        'method': method,
        'mean_a': float(np.mean(values_a)),
        'mean_b': float(np.mean(values_b)),
        'std_a': float(np.std(values_a, ddof=1)),
        'std_b': float(np.std(values_b, ddof=1)),
        'n_a': len(values_a),
        'n_b': len(values_b),
    }
def minimum_sample_size(
    baseline_rate: float,
    minimum_effect: float,
    alpha: float = 0.05,
    power: float = 0.8
) -> int:
    if baseline_rate <= 0 or minimum_effect <= 0:
        return 1
    z_alpha = scipy_stats.norm.ppf(1 - alpha / 2)
    z_beta = scipy_stats.norm.ppf(power)
    p_avg = baseline_rate + minimum_effect / 2
    variance = p_avg * (1 - p_avg)
    n = int(math.ceil(
        2 * variance * (z_alpha + z_beta)**2 / minimum_effect**2
    ))
    return max(n, 2)
def compute_win_probability(
    strategy_params: list,
    simulations: int = 10000
) -> Dict[int, float]:
    if not strategy_params:
        return {}
    strategy_ids = [s['strategy_id'] for s in strategy_params]
    wins = {sid: 0 for sid in strategy_ids}
    for _ in range(simulations):
        samples = []
        for s in strategy_params:
            theta = random.betavariate(s['alpha'], s['beta'])
            samples.append((s['strategy_id'], theta))
        winner = max(samples, key=lambda x: x[1])[0]
        wins[winner] += 1
    return {
        sid: count / simulations
        for sid, count in wins.items()
    }
```


## scripts/analysis/test_ab_analysis.py

```python
import sys, os
sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
import json
import math
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, PropertyMock
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
sys.modules['pymysql'] = MagicMock()
sys.modules['pymysql.cursors'] = MagicMock()
sys.modules['redis'] = MagicMock()
from ab_analysis import (
    compute_metrics, perform_statistical_tests,
    update_bandit_params, store_results,
    check_convergence,
)
import stat_utils
pass_count = 0
fail_count = 0
def check(name, ok, detail=""):
    global pass_count, fail_count
    if ok:
        print(f"  ✓ {name}" + (f"  ({detail})" if detail else ""))
        pass_count += 1
    else:
        print(f"  ✗ {name}  {detail}")
        fail_count += 1
print("\n=== compute_metrics ===")
m = compute_metrics(1, [])
check("空数据: total_exposures=0", m['total_exposures'] == 0)
check("空数据: ctr=0", m['ctr'] == 0.0)
behaviors = [
    {'behavior_type': 'click', 'user_id': 1},
    {'behavior_type': 'rate', 'rating_value': 5, 'user_id': 1},
    {'behavior_type': 'favorite', 'user_id': 2},
    {'behavior_type': 'play', 'watch_seconds': 120, 'user_id': 3},
    {'behavior_type': 'rate', 'rating_value': 2, 'user_id': 4},
    {'behavior_type': 'click', 'user_id': 5},
]
m = compute_metrics(1, behaviors)
check("混合数据: total_exposures=6", m['total_exposures'] == 6)
check("混合数据: total_clicks=2", m['total_clicks'] == 2)
check("混合数据: total_ratings=2", m['total_ratings'] == 2)
check("混合数据: total_collects=1", m['total_collects'] == 1)
check("混合数据: total_watch_seconds=120", m['total_watch_seconds'] == 120)
check("混合数据: unique_users=5", m['unique_users'] == 5)
check("混合数据: positive_events=5", m['positive_events'] == 5)
check("混合数据: ctr=5/6≈0.8333", abs(m['ctr'] - 5/6) < 0.001)
check("混合数据: CI区间有效", m['ctr_ci_lower'] < m['ctr'] < m['ctr_ci_upper'])
```
